description.value:
Send Medication data MVE building blocks for patient M. XXX_Niesing
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_medicatiegegevens_sturen_MVE
Original description: TEST Medicatiegegevens MVE Scenarioset 10 (ZI)
Send Medication data MVE resources in a transaction Bundle
Test client to POST a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '16255429') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '2593866') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '2941') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '83593') ))).where((quantity.value = 150)).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '16255429|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.8' (INDAPAMIDE CF TABLET OMHULD 2,5MG)
